title: CAA-1 / CXD-1 Continuity Assimilation Receipt
description: Proves calibration propagated across a generational boundary via measurable assimilation

cxd_id.description: Unique identifier for the assimilation event

isolation_proof.description: Hash proving steward did not participate in original calibration

pre_assimilation_judgment.description: Hash of steward judgment before lineage replay

post_assimilation_judgment.description: Hash of steward judgment after lineage replay

assimilation_delta.description: Measured improvement in judgment quality (Q_post - Q_pre)

assimilation_threshold.description: Minimum delta required to claim continuity propagation (tau_A)

proof_bundle.description: Hash of proof bundle validating assimilation
